title: Tsun Qel
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Yuuzhan Vong |image= |name=Tsun Qel |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Yuuzhan Vong]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |caste=[[Shaper caste]] |domain=[[Domain Qel]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|So it ''is'' true. Here, you pursue our dream, the superprotocol—the methods of finding new knowledge without asking the gods.''"
"''Here, in these chambers of the master, such things may be spoken in security, but outside of this room, have a care.''"
"''Yes, of course. I know what happens to heretics as well as you.|Tsun Qel and Nen Yim|}} '''Tsun Qel''' was a member of the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Initiate (Shaper)|Shaper Initiate]] of [[Domain Qel]], he went to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], to look in on the [[Shaping protocol|shaping]] of [[Tahiri Veila]]. He told [[Shaper Adept]] [[Nen Yim]] that he had been sent by [[Mezhan Kwaad]] herself, and made mention of [[Yakun Kwaad]], a former shaper apprentice and Nen's dead lover, as evidence. Convinced, she told Qel of everything that Kwaad and Yim had performed. In truth, however, Tsun Qel had been sent by [[Master Shaper]] [[Yal Phaath]] to investigate whether or not they had performed heresy. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' {{1stID|Qel}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Tsun Q'el }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Qel, Tsun}} [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong shapers]]
